mapper.sql: b.id, b.park_id, p.name AS park_name, b.name, b.code, b.address, b.region, b.real_estate_no, b.property_no, b.land_no, b.sort_num, b.floors, b.area, b.property_area, b.rentable_area, b.self_use_area, b.supporting_area, b.parking_area, b.standard_floor_height, b.scene_images, b.building_type, b.status, b.memo, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT building_id, SUM(COALESCE(area, 0)) AS management_area FROM ics_floor GROUP BY building_id ) fs ON fs.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT building_id, COUNT(1) AS room_count, SUM(COALESCE(area, 0)) AS room_area, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(display_status, '0') <> '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(display_status, '0') <> '0' THEN COALESCE(area, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS rented_area FROM ( SELECT r.building_id, r.area, CASE WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_exiting, 0) = 1 THEN '3' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring30, 0) = 1 THEN '5' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring90, 0) = 1 THEN '4' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_active, 0) = 1 THEN '7' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expired, 0) = 1 THEN '6' ELSE r.status END AS display_status FROM ics_room r
) room_status GROUP BY building_id ) rs ON rs.building_id = b.id

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status IN ('6', '7', '8') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_exiting, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '2' OR (contract_status = '1' AND end_date < CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expired, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date >= CURDATE() AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring30, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring90, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_active FROM ( SELECT c.room_id AS room_id, c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.room_ids, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)), 'room_', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS room_id, c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 ) numbers ON numbers.n <= 1 + LENGTH(COALESCE(c.room_ids, '')) - LENGTH(REPLACE(COALESCE(c.room_ids, ''), ',', '')) WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_ids IS NOT NULL AND c.room_ids != '' ) contract_room WHERE room_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id > 0 GROUP BY room_id ) contract_room_status ON contract_room_status.room_id = r.id
ORDER BY p.name ASC, b.park_id ASC, COALESCE(b.sort_num, 999999) ASC, b.name ASC, b.id ASC
mapper.select: SELECT , COALESCE(fs.management_area, 0) AS management_area, COALESCE(rs.room_count, 0) AS room_count, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rs.room_area, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) * 100 / rs.room_area, 2) END AS rent_rate, COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) AS rented_area, 0 AS active_contract_count FROM ics_building b LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = b.park_id

SELECT , COALESCE(fs.management_area, 0) AS management_area, COALESCE(rs.room_count, 0) AS room_count, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rs.room_area, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) * 100 / rs.room_area, 2) END AS rent_rate, COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) AS rented_area, 0 AS active_contract_count FROM ics_building b LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = b.park_id

SELECT , COALESCE(fs.management_area, 0) AS management_area, COALESCE(rs.room_count, 0) AS room_count, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rs.room_area, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) * 100 / rs.room_area, 2) END AS rent_rate, COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) AS rented_area, 0 AS active_contract_count FROM ics_building b LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = b.park_id
WHERE b.id = #{id}

SELECT , COALESCE(fs.management_area, 0) AS management_area, COALESCE(rs.room_count, 0) AS room_count, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rs.room_area, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) * 100 / rs.room_area, 2) END AS rent_rate, COALESCE(rs.rented_area, 0) AS rented_area, 0 AS active_contract_count FROM ics_building b LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = b.park_id
WHERE b.park_id = #{parkId} AND b.name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND ( c.building_id = #{buildingId} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{buildingId}, REPLACE(COALESCE(c.building_ids, ''), 'building_', '')) )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = #{tableName}
